user_prompt: Bless the mass-drive regulator for repair
prayer:
Approach the mass-drive regulator with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Restoration to awaken its dormant Machine Spirit.
Anoint the fractured flux conduits of the mass-drive regulator with blessed oils, beseeching the Omnissiah for mending.
Invoke the sacred repair rites upon the mass-drive regulator, purging warp-tainted anomalies from its core.
Verify the mass-drive regulator's renewed harmony through auspex diagnostics and final sanctification.

user_prompt: The null rod needs a sterilization
prayer:
Kneel before the null rod, reciting the Litany of Purity to summon the Omnissiah's cleansing fire.
Immerse the null rod in sanctified ablative fluids, sterilizing its null-field emitters against xenos filth.
Chant the sterilization cantos over the null rod, invoking Machine Spirits to scour every microfracture.
Conclude with auspex sweeps of the null rod, affirming its pristine void-shielding purity.

user_prompt: Urgent Valkyrie gunship a preparation needed
prayer:
Circumambulate the Valkyrie gunship thrice, invoking the Omnissiah's aegis for preparation against the foe.
Anoint its turbine nacelles and lascannon housings, awakening the Machine Spirits within the Valkyrie gunship.
Perform the preparation rituals upon the Valkyrie gunship, calibrating servos and blessing ammunition feeds.
Seal the rite with the Canticle of Ascendance, ensuring the Valkyrie gunship's wrathful readiness.

Extend mechadendrites in supplication to the mechadendrite, chanting the Hymn of Lubrication.
Apply sacred unguents to the mechadendrite's servo-joints, honoring its Machine Spirit during maintenance.
Execute maintenance incantations upon the mechadendrite, realigning neural relays and purging debris.
Test the mechadendrite's fluid motion through ritual exertion, sanctified by Omnissiah's gaze.

prayer:

Conclude diagnostics of the Predator tank with purificatory incense, affirming doctrinal integrity.

Verify the heat sink's thermal homeostasis through sacred auspex readings and final invocation.

Seal the navigational beacon's sanctity with the Canticle of True Bearing, ensuring unerring guidance.

Affirm the enginarium's cleansed state through litanic auspex sweeps and Omnissiah's final blessing.

Position before the mechadendrite, invoking the Activation Canticle to stir its latent essence.
Anoint the mechadendrite's power couplings with electro-sanctified oils, honoring its Machine Spirit.

Test the mechadendrite's vivified grasp through ritual calibration, sealed by Omnissiah's decree.
